title: Trump ends Iran meeting without announcing ‘final determination’ on deal
summary_full: Trump's Truth Social statement left unclear which of his conditions are already part of a deal that negotiators are working on to pause the U.S.-Iran war.
summary_public: Trump's Truth Social statement left unclear which of his conditions are already part of a deal that negotiators are working on to pause the U.S.-Iran war.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: Trump ends Iran meeting without announcing ‘final determination’
